text:
10 Best IT Assessment Tools in 2026

Effectively identifying top candidates and evaluating technical skills are crucial difficulties for firms operating in the fast-paced software development industry. IT assessment tools have become essential in this process.

The 10 Tools Reviewed:
1. WeCP - AI-powered platform with 200k+ technical questions, WeCP AI Copilot, collaborative code editor, real-time feedback, and proctored assessments. Pricing: $240/month (7-day free trial).
2. HackerRank - Provides code challenges, vast library of pre-made assessments, AI plagiarism detection, and collaborative interviewing tools. Pricing: $100-$450/month.
3. HackerEarth - Offers customized coding challenges, soft skills tests, real-time virtual interviews, and talent assessment via integrated IDE. Pricing: $209-$419/month.
4. Mettl - Features real-time coding environment, remote proctoring, behavioral competency assessments. Pricing: Contact support.
5. iMocha - AI-powered assessments covering coding, data science, cybersecurity; includes live whiteboard interviews and AI-LogicBox. Pricing: $5,000/year.
6. Coderpad - Provides collaborative IDE, take-home assignments, whiteboarding tools. Pricing: $840-$3,900/year.
7. Coderbyte - Offers 1,000+ problems, 30+ languages, live IDE with whiteboard. Pricing: $199/month or $1,699/year.
8. Codility - Features Codelive collaborative tool and Codecheck skill assessment with AI assistance. Pricing: $1,200-$5,000/year.
9. CodeSignal - Cloud-based platform with talent evaluations, coding competitions, and 70+ languages. Pricing: Contact sales.
10. CodeInterview - Cloud-based editor supporting 30+ languages, whiteboard mode, and personalized learning paths.

The article emphasizes that 'using the best IT assessment tools to evaluate technical proficiency' remains essential for organizations seeking quality talent.
